name: the corpus partitions into both rule sets with a non-empty IaC set, full-stack set, and shared both-set
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/classify-path.sh" --audit 2>e.txt; node -e 'const s=require("fs").readFileSync("e.txt","utf8");const m=s.match(/iac=(\d+) fullstack=(\d+) both=(\d+)/);process.exit(m && +m[1]>0 && +m[2]>0 && +m[3]>0 ?0:1)' && echo both-rule-sets-present 1>&2
